title: MUHUOTU 木火土｜平鋪俯視 Flat Lay
summary: 天然亞麻紋理背景，瓶身搭配洋甘菊、尤加利、鵝卵石、金色爪印吊飾與陶瓷碟，高端編輯風格。
prompt: Top-down flat lay on natural linen-textured surface. Center: MUHUOTU 100ml matte white spray bottle with gold logo facing up. Surrounding: dried botanicals (chamomile, eucalyptus), smooth river pebbles, gold paw print charm, cream ceramic dish. Soft overhead diffused natural light. Palette: ivory, sage green, warm gold. Ultra-clean premium editorial photography, 8K resolution.
